name: system_info
description: 收集系统信息，包括操作系统版本、磁盘空间、内存使用情况
author: ReAct Agent Framework

input.command: Write-Output '=== OS Info ==='; Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object Caption, Version, BuildNumber | Format-List

Write-Output '=== Disk Info ==='; Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk | ForEach-Object { $size = [math]::Round($_.Size/1GB,2); $free = [math]::Round($_.FreeSpace/1GB,2); Write-Output "$($_.DeviceID) Size:${size}GB Free:${free}GB" }

Write-Output '=== Memory Info ==='; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $total = [math]::Round($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB,2); $free = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,2); Write-Output "Total: ${total} MB, Free: ${free} MB, Used: $($total-$free) MB"
Write-Output '=== CPU Info ==='; Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select-Object Name, NumberOfCores, MaxClockSpeed | Format-List
